eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Quay, NM; at 07:23 AM ON MAY 22, 2026 Effective until 07:23 AM MAY 23, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Quay County has issued a burn ban due to extreme drought conditions and help firefighting operations. DO NOT BURN OUTSIDE. Violators will be prosecuted and fined according to law. Follow all local regulations and stay informed about fire safety measures. Stay tuned to local media, radio and official channels for updates.
